attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 EDNRTGL.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY				,
 EDNRTGL.DV_REVENUE_FLG					,
 EDNRTGL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT			,
 EDNRTGL.BK_SS_CD					,
 EDNRTGL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT			,
 EDNRTGL.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT			,
 EDNRTGL.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT			,
 EDNRTGL.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD				,
 EDNRTGL.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD				,
 EDNRTGL.LINE_TYPE_CD					,
 EDNRTGL.SPLIT_PCT					,
 EDNRTGL.GL_DTM						,
 EDNRTGL.GL_POSTED_DTM					,
 EDNRTGL.RULE_START_DTM					,
 EDNRTGL.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD				,
 EDNRTGL.LAST_RECORD_FLG				,
 EDNRTGL.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD				,
 EDNRTGL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD			,
 EDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT			,
 EDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT			,
 EDNRTGL.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE				,
 EDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT			,
 EDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_KEY				,
 EDNRTGL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY				,
 EDNRTGL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY				,
 EDNRTGL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY				,
 EDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY				,
 EDNRTGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY				,
 EDNRTGL.AR_TRX_KEY					,
 EDNRTGL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY			,
 EDNRTGL.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT			,
 EDNRTGL.PRODUCT_KEY					,
 EDNRTGL.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD				,
 EDNRTGL.DV_CHARGES_FLG					,
 EDNRTGL.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG				,
 EDNRTGL.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG			,
 EDNRTGL.DV_MISC_FLG					,
 EDNRTGL.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG			,
 EDNRTGL.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG				,
 EDNRTGL.DV_SERVICE_FLG					,
 EDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT			,
 EDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT			,
 EDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT				,
 EDNRTGL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY				,
 EDNRTGL.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY			,
 EDNRTGL.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG				,
 EDNRTGL.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM				,
 EDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD			,
 EDNRTGL.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM			,
 EDNRTGL.SHIPPED_DT					,
 EDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD				,
 EDNRTGL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY			,
 EDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT			,
 EDNRTGL.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME				,
 EDNRTGL.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD				,
 EDNRTGL.MAJOR_LINE_FLG					,
 EDNRTGL.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY			,
 EDNRTGL.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD			,
 EDNRTGL.SERVICE_TYPE_CD				,
 EDNRTGL.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT				,
 EDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT				,
 EDNRTGL.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT			,
 EDNRTGL.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD			,
 EDNRTGL.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY			,
 EDNRTGL.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD				,
 EDNRTGL.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY				,
 EDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME				,
 EDNRTGL.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD				,
 EDNRTGL.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY			,
 EDNRTGL.SALES_REP_NUM					,
 EDNRTGL.ACTION_CODE					,
 EDNRTGL.DML_TYPE					,
 EDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_DT	,
 EDNRTGL.GL_DT			,
EDNRTGL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY	,
EDNRTGL.DV_COMP_FUNC_REBATE_AMT	,
EDNRTGL.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
EDNRTGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
EDNRTGL.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_GL_OOD EDNRTGL
WHERE EDNRTGL.EXCEPTION_TYPE ='RI'

SELECT 
 WDNRTGL.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY       REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_KEY     SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.PRODUCT_KEY     PRODUCT_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.AR_TRX_KEY     AR_TRX_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY     AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY   BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
 CASE WHEN WDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY NOT IN (-9999,-8888) THEN COALESCE(END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) 
 WHEN WDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IN (-9999,-8888) THEN COALESCE(SO_END_CUST.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) ELSE -999 END AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY    BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY    SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY   SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY    SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY   DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
 CASE  WHEN EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY IS NULL THEN -998 
   ELSE EVNGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY 
 END          GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.SALES_REP_NUM        SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 
 CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)      BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)       BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)       BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 
 WDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT      DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 WDNRTGL.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
 WDNRTGL.GL_DTM           DD_GL_DATETIME,
 WDNRTGL.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD       DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
 WDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME       BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
 WDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_DT     DV_FISCAL_DT,
 WDNRTGL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD   DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD,
 CASE  WHEN WOXRTR.EXTRACT_TYPE='CORP_ADJ' 
   THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
   ELSE NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE 
 END         DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTGL.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTGL.SERVICE_TYPE_CD         DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTGL.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD        BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 CASE  WHEN WOXRTR.EXTRACT_TYPE<>'CORP_ADJ' 
   THEN NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME   
   ELSE NULL 
 END           AR_TRX_DATETIME,
 'AR-OOD'           REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 WDNRTGL.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 WDNRTGL.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG        DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
 WDNRTGL.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG    DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 WDNRTGL.DV_CHARGES_FLG      DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 WDNRTGL.DV_MISC_FLG     DV_MISC_FLG,
 WDNRTGL.DV_SERVICE_FLG     DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 WDNRTGL.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG   DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 WDNRTGL.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG    DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 WDNRTGL.DV_REVENUE_FLG     DV_REVENUE_FLG,
 WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT   DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT       DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT ,
 CASE   WHEN  WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ'  
   THEN  0.0000000
       ELSE WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT    
 END           DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM,
 WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT        DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
 CASE  WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='ERP_ADJ'  
  THEN  0.0000000 
  ELSE COALESCE ( WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000 ) + COALESCE ( WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT, 0.000000 )  
 END              DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 COALESCE(WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000) + COALESCE(WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT,0.000000)    DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
 CASE  WHEN ECGA.EXCLUDE_2TIER_TRX_FLAG = 'Y' THEN 
  CASE  WHEN WDNRTGL.LINE_TYPE_CD  ='LINE'  THEN  
   CAST(CAST(WDNRTGL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT AS DECIMAL(27,8))  * 
   CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(27,8))
      ELSE 0.000000    
       END
 ELSE 0.000000 
 END           DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
 CASE  WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='ERP_ADJ' 
   THEN 0.0000000
    ELSE WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT 
 END           DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
 WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT     DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT ,
  /* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/ 
 CASE  WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('INV' , 'ERP_ADJ')  
   THEN  CASE WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' AND ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' THEN 0    ELSE  DV_EXTENDED_QTY END 
     WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'CM' THEN 
        CASE  WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
          THEN WDNRTGL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
          ELSE 0.000000
        END
    ELSE 0.000000  
  END          DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
   /* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/ 
 CASE  WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' THEN CASE WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD='INV' AND ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' THEN 0   ELSE     DV_EXTENDED_QTY END               
     WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'CM' 
     THEN CASE  WHEN NSOT.DV_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_ALT_NAME = 'RMA with Credit' 
        THEN WDNRTGL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY 
         ELSE 0.000000
       END
    ELSE 0.000000  
  END          DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY, 
 WDNRTGL.GL_DT,
 WDNRTGL.BK_SS_CD,
  /* Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/ 
 CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE'ICMS%'AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' THEN 0 ELSE DV_EXTENDED_QTY  END EXTENDED_QTY, 
 WDNRTGL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
 WDNRTGL.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
 WDNRTGL.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
 WDNRTGL.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD,
 WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 WDNRTGL.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
 CASE WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'ERP_ADJ' THEN 
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(NRA.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,'NA') IN ('PA','DA')  THEN NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT ELSE NDCA.DV_TRANSACTION_DT END
 ELSE (CASE WHEN WOXRTR.EXTRACT_TYPE<>'CORP_ADJ'  THEN NAT.DV_AR_TRX_DT   ELSE NULL END ) END TRANSACTION_DT  ,
 WDNRTGL.GL_POSTED_DTM ,
 WDNRTGL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
 'I'        AS ACTION_CODE,
 'I'        AS DML_TYPE,
 WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT   DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 CASE  WHEN WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='ERP_ADJ'  
  THEN  0.0000000 
  ELSE COALESCE ( WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000 ) + COALESCE ( WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_FUNC_REBATE_AMT, 0.000000 )  
 END DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT,
 COALESCE(WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT, 0.000000) + COALESCE(WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_FUNC_REBATE_AMT,0.000000)    DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT,
 WDNRTGL.SPLIT_PCT,
 WDNRTGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
 WDNRTGL.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
 -999 AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
 WDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 -9999 AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 WDNRTGL.PRODUCT_KEY DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 'STANDALONE' AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 /* prbobba : Added for SAAS Q3FY14 */
 COALESCE(NSORD.BK_DEAL_ID,NAT.BK_DEAL_ID) AS DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,
 /* prbobba : Added for SAAS Q3FY14 */
 /* prbobba : Added for SAAS Q1FY15 */
 COALESCE(NSORD.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
 /* prbobba : Added for SAAS Q1FY15 */
 /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 CASE WHEN ABT.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME LIKE 'ICMS%' AND NAT.RU_SAF_TYPE_CD ='DEBIT_REBILL' AND WDNRTGL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'INV' THEN 'DM' ELSE TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD END AS DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
 CASE WHEN DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  IN ('CM','DM') THEN DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT -WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT  WHEN DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' THEN  DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT ELSE 0 END  DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,
 CASE WHEN DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD IN ('CM','DM') THEN DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT-WDNRTGL.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT 
                 WHEN DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ='INV' THEN DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT ELSE 0 END DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT
 /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
  ,WDNRTGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY           /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
 ,-999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY                /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
, 'N' AS XCAT_FLG /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */
,'Others' AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */
 ,'N' AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG  /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */  
,'N' AS ELA_FLG  /* added Default value , RO proj, Q3FY17 */ 
, COALESCE(NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /*Added as part of Q3FY20 ICPM FEB REL */
,CASE WHEN RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT/10 <WDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT THEN WDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT*10+1 ELSE
RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT END AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT    /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/    
FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_GL_OOD   WDNRTGL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON ( WDNRTGL.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_TRX_RV_OOD  WOXRTR
  ON ( WDNRTGL.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  = WOXRTR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID 
  AND WOXRTR.GLOBAL_NAME  = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)  
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX  NAT 
  ON (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = WDNRTGL.AR_TRX_KEY)
  
 /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE ABT
 ON ABT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY=NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
 
 INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE  NATT
  ON (NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
  AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
  AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER    NSORD 
  ON (WDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORD.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE   NSOT
  ON (NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME) 
 /*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
ON RFD.CALENDAR_DATE=Cast(WDNRTGL.GL_DTM AS DATE)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM ON
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=WDNRTGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDM
ON RFDM.CALENDAR_DATE=CASE WHEN Cast(WDNRTGL.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE)<= RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AND WDNRTGL.GL_DTM BETWEEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE THEN WDNRTGL.GL_POSTED_DTM 
WHEN WDNRTGL.GL_DTM < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
ELSE RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE END
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER  END_CUST
  ON  ( WDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = END_CUST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SO_END_CUSTOMER  SO_END_CUST
  ON  ( WDNRTGL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SO_END_CUST.SALES_ORDER_KEY )
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  EVNGLA
  ON ( EVNGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = WOXRTR.CODE_COMBINATION_ID  
  AND  EVNGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='BE') 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDW_GL_ACCOUNTS  ECGA
  ON ( ECGA.GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = WOXRTR.ACCOUNT_CODE) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE     NCCDR_FUNC
  ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WDNRTGL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= WDNRTGL.GL_DT
  AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DIRECT_CORPORATE_ADJUSTMENT NDCA
  ON(NDCA.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=WDNRTGL.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LINE SRASC
   ON(SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY =  WDNRTGL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY)
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RAE_ADJUSTMENT NRA 
   ON (NRA.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY=SRASC.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_KEY)
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE  NATIL
  ON (NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY= WDNRTGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)

SELECT WDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.DV_REVENUE_FLG, 
WDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT, 
WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD, 
WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT, 
WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
WDNRTFR.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
WDNRTFR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD, 
WDNRTFR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD, 
WDNRTFR.LINE_TYPE_CD,
WDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT, 
WDNRTFR.GL_DTM ,
WDNRTFR.GL_POSTED_DTM, 
WDNRTFR.RULE_START_DTM, 
WDNRTFR.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD, 
WDNRTFR.LAST_RECORD_FLG, 
WDNRTFR.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD, 
WDNRTFR.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD, 
WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, 
WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT, 
WDNRTFR.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE, 
WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT, 
WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT, 
WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD, 
WDNRTFR.DV_CHARGES_FLG, 
WDNRTFR.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG, 
WDNRTFR.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, 
WDNRTFR.DV_MISC_FLG, 
WDNRTFR.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG, 
WDNRTFR.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG, 
WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG, 
WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 
WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT, 
WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT, 
WDNRTFR.DV_EXTENDED_QTY, 
WDNRTFR.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG, 
WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM, 
WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, 
WDNRTFR.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM, 
WDNRTFR.SHIPPED_DT, 
WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD, 
WDNRTFR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT, 
WDNRTFR.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME, 
WDNRTFR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD, 
WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_FLG, 
WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD, 
WDNRTFR.SERVICE_TYPE_CD, 
WDNRTFR.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT, 
WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT, 
WDNRTFR.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT, 
WDNRTFR.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD, 
WDNRTFR.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, 
WDNRTFR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, 
WDNRTFR.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD, 
WDNRTFR.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
WDNRTFR.SALES_REP_NUM, 
WDNRTFR.ACTION_CODE, 
WDNRTFR.DML_TYPE, 
WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_DT,
CAST(WDNRTFR.GL_DTM AS DATE)    AS GL_DT,
WDNRTFR.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_FUNC_REBATE_AMT,
WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
BK_COMPANY_CODE,
BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_EL_DRVD_NCR_RT_FOR_RV_OOD WDNRTFR
WHERE WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD <> 'INV'

 WGRM.LINE_TYPE_CD				,
 WGRM.SPLIT_PCT					,

 WGRM.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD			,

 WGRM.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM			,
 WGRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD		,
 WGRM.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM		,
 WGRM.SHIPPED_DT				,
 WGRM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD			,
 WGRM.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY		,
 WGRM.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT		,
 WGRM.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME			,
 WGRM.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD			,
 WGRM.MAJOR_LINE_FLG				,
 WGRM.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY		,
 WGRM.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD		,
 WGRM.SERVICE_TYPE_CD				,
 WGRM.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT			,
 WGRM.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT			,
 WGRM.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT			,
 WGRM.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD			,
 WGRM.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY		,
 WGRM.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD			,
 WGRM.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY			,
 WGRM.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME			,
 WGRM.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD			,
 WGRM.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY		,
 WGRM.EDW_CREATE_USER				,
 WGRM.EDW_CREATE_DTM				,
 WGRM.EDW_UPDATE_USER				,
 WGRM.EDW_UPDATE_DTM				,
 WGRM.SALES_REP_NUM				,
 WGRM.ACTION_CODE				,
 WGRM.DML_TYPE					,
 WGRM.DV_FISCAL_DT				,
 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE ,
 WGRM.GL_DT,
 WGRM.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
WGRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_REBATE_AMT,
WGRM.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT,
WGRM.BK_COMPANY_CODE,
WGRM.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_GL_OOD WGRM
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON (WGRM.BK_SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
WHERE 
(
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_OM_XXNCR_REV_TRX_RV_OOD WOXRTR
 	WHERE WGRM.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT  = WOXRTR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID 
	AND WOXRTR.GLOBAL_NAME  = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
OR 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
	WHERE NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = WGRM.AR_TRX_KEY
	AND NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 	AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
 	AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
OR 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER  NSORD,$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TYPE NSOT
	WHERE WGRM.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSORD.SALES_ORDER_KEY
	AND NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME = NSORD.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME))

SELECT
  REV_TRX.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
 ,REV_TRX.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
 ,REV_TRX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
 ,REV_TRX.PRODUCT_KEY                   
 ,REV_TRX.AR_TRX_KEY                    
 ,REV_TRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
 ,REV_TRX.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
 ,REV_TRX.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
 ,REV_TRX.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,REV_TRX.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,REV_TRX.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
 ,REV_TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
 ,REV_TRX.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
 ,REV_TRX.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
 ,REV_TRX.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
 ,REV_TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
 ,REV_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
 ,REV_TRX.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
 ,REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
 ,REV_TRX.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
 ,REV_TRX.DD_GL_DATETIME                
 ,REV_TRX.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
 ,REV_TRX.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            
 ,REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
 ,REV_TRX.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
 ,REV_TRX.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
 ,REV_TRX.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
 ,REV_TRX.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            
 ,REV_TRX.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
 ,REV_TRX.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
 ,REV_TRX.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
 ,REV_TRX.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         
 ,REV_TRX.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
 ,REV_TRX.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
 ,REV_TRX.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
 ,REV_TRX.DV_MISC_FLG                   
 ,REV_TRX.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
 ,REV_TRX.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
 ,REV_TRX.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
 ,REV_TRX.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
 ,REV_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           
 ,REV_TRX.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         
 ,REV_TRX.EDW_CREATE_USER               
 ,REV_TRX.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
 ,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           
 ,REV_TRX.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
 ,REV_TRX.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD 
 ,REV_TRX.GL_DT  
 ,REV_TRX.BK_SS_CD
 ,REV_TRX.DV_EXTENDED_QTY
 ,REV_TRX.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
 ,REV_TRX.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT
 ,REV_TRX.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD
 ,REV_TRX.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD
 ,REV_TRX.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD
 ,REV_TRX.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY
 ,REV_TRX.TRANSACTION_DT
 ,REV_TRX.GL_POSTED_DTM
 ,REV_TRX.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY 
 ,REV_TRX.ACTION_CODE                   
 ,REV_TRX.DML_TYPE
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT
 ,REV_TRX.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT
 ,REV_TRX.SPLIT_PCT
 ,REV_TRX.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 ,REV_TRX.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
 ,REV_TRX.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
 ,REV_TRX.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
 ,REV_TRX.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
 ,REV_TRX.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
 ,REV_TRX.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
 ,COALESCE(REV_TRX.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN')     AS DV_ERP_DEAL_ID    
 ,COALESCE(REV_TRX.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD, /* prbobba : added as part of Q1FY15*/    
 REV_TRX.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ,    /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 REV_TRX.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT,            /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
 REV_TRX.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   /* Added as part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
  ,REV_TRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY           /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
 ,-999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY                /* goponnus : Added as part of SAAS-OA Q1FY16 */
,REV_TRX.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME /*Added as part of ICPM Q2FY16*/
,COALESCE(REV_TRX.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /*Added as part of Q3FY20 ICPM FEB REL */ 
,CASE WHEN RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT/10 < REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT THEN REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT*10+1 ELSE
RFDM.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT END AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_RV_ENDCUST_RET_AR_OOD_H REV_TRX
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFD
ON RFD.CALENDAR_DATE=Cast(REV_TRX.GL_DT AS DATE)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM ON
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDM
ON  RFDM.CALENDAR_DATE=CASE WHEN Cast(REV_TRX.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE)<= RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AND REV_TRX.GL_DT BETWEEN 
RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE THEN REV_TRX.GL_POSTED_DTM 
WHEN REV_TRX.GL_DT < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE 
ELSE RFD.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE END
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_GL_REV_MEASURE WGL
    WHERE  WGL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = REV_TRX.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY AND
         WGL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = REV_TRX.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
 AND WGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = REV_TRX.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT)

SELECT
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,GL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,GL.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,GL.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,GL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,GL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,CASE WHEN GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY<0 THEN -999 ELSE GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY           
,GL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,GL.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
,GL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,GL.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,GL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
,GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,GL.DD_GL_DATETIME                
,GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,GL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            
,GL.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
,GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
,GL.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
,GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
,GL.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            
,GL.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
,GL.AR_TRX_DATETIME

,GL.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD

,GL.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
,GL.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
,GL.DV_MISC_FLG                   
,GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
,GL.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
,GL.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
,GL.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
,GL.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     
,GL.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
,GL.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           
,GL.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         
,GL.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,GL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME          
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME               
,GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    
,GL.GL_DT                         
,GL.BK_SS_CD                      
,GL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
,GL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
,GL.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,GL.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,GL.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
,GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
,GL.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
,GL.TRANSACTION_DT                
,GL.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
,GL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
,GL.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_PRICE_AMT    
,GL.DV_COMP_FUNC_GROSS_REV_AMT    
,GL.DV_COMP_FUNC_NET_REV_AMT      
,GL.SPLIT_PCT                     
,GL.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,GL.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,GL.DV_2T_DISTI_REVENUE_FLG       
,GL.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY          
,GL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       
,GL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
,GL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                
,GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             
,GL.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                
,GL.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD           
,GL.DV_FMV_FLG                    
,GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,GL.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT        
,GL.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   
,GL.BK_BOOKING_POS_TRX_ID_INT     
,GL.DSV_FLG                       
,GL.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
,GL.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
,GL.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME          
,GL.DV_COMP_FUNC_2TIER_CMDM_AMT   
,CMN.NEW_XCAT_FLG AS XCAT_FLG                 
,CMN.NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME       
,CMN.NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG      
,CMN.NEW_ELA_FLG AS ELA_FLG
,GL.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME /*Added as part of Q3FY20 ICPM FEB REL */ 
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
,GL.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE GL,
$$STGDB.WI_GL_RORTRO_XCT_MP_FLG_OOD CMN
WHERE 
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  = CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_GL_REV_MEASURE WGL
WHERE  WGL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
AND WGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
AND WGL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD)
